title: After the Kikuka Sho: Will to Protect

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin loses the Kikuka Sho and collapses
from exhaustion after crossing the finish line.
When she comes to, she laments what happened.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out that when she returned home, she
learned that her sisters quit dancing to take over
housework duties from their sickly mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in an effort to ease her sisters' worries, Ines
took on more part-time work and set about trying
to change the way she runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wish she said something, but I assume she kept it
all to herself because she didn't want anyone
worrying about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her worries are my worries too. I promise her
we'll work something out, and we set the Osaka
Hai as our next goal to give ourselves plenty of
time.
